caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on a platform called Kumu, focusing on the concepts of trial and learning within systems thinking. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content displayed is a visual map with interconnected nodes representing various aspects of modeling and learning processes. Key elements include "models and methods," "develop models," and "learn modeling," all connected by arrows indicating a cyclical relationship. A central image of a person sitting on a question mark symbolizes inquiry and problem-solving. The background is dark, highlighting the colorful nodes and connections, which suggest a structured yet dynamic approach to understanding complex systems. The overall atmosphere suggests an educational or professional setting aimed at teaching viewers about systematic approaches to problem-solving and model development.
